overall_summary: Positioned as a diet-friendly, sugar-free flavoring syrup catering to health-conscious consumers seeking indulgence without added calories. Kosher certification and gluten-free claim may appeal to specific dietary needs, potentially justifying a slightly higher price than generic syrups but not premium positioning. The 25.4 fl oz size offers reasonable volume for home use, balancing affordability and utility.
